contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Trace 3 missing reply drafts: 2 stale 'sent' flips + 1 orphan manual draft
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/205
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/108
  
  Details:
  Operator pointed at 3 specific Gmail thread URLs whose reply drafts weren't surfacing in the DApp Outbound Review Prospects tab. Diagnostic walked Gmail thread metadata + Email Agent Drafts + Email Agent Follow Up:
  
  Seagrape Apothecary (thread 19dc0716998fe8fa): Email Agent Drafts row 196 had status=sent, but Gmail still has the reply draft msg 19de92b88ab75d6f as DRAFT=True. Msgid is NOT in Email Agent Follow Up — past status flip was stale (likely manual edit or older code path that no longer exists). Filter excludes anything not at pending_review.
  
  Devine Wellness (thread 19de0629f71211fc): Same shape — row 197 stuck at status=sent for the unsent reply draft msg 19de92baae0f9e77.
  
  Care Rituals (thread 19de928617afc457): No Email Agent Drafts row at all for the reply draft msg 19df15627bf54a2a. Operator started the reply manually in Gmail, bypassing suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py --create-reply-drafts, so nothing logged it. Gmail draft also missing the AI/Prospect Replied label — only had [DRAFT].
  
  Live fixes:
  1. Flipped Email Agent Drafts rows 196 + 197 from sent back to pending_review.
  2. Applied AI/Prospect Replied label to Care Rituals draft msg 19df15627bf54a2a.
  3. Appended new Email Agent Drafts row for Care Rituals draft (linked to Hit List row 433, notes=kind=warmup_reply; source=manual; backfilled).
  
  Verified via direct GAS endpoint: counts now AI/Warm-up=0, AI/Follow-up=2, AI/Prospect Replied=3, total_pending=5. All 3 reply drafts visible.
  
  Recommended follow-up: hard to root-cause why rows 196+197 got to sent in the first place — could be a past reconciler bug or manual edit. Worth adding a guard to any future reconcile that doesn't flip to sent unless the msgid is genuinely in Follow Up.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
